response.justification: Bogdan brings approximately 17-20 years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, which partially satisfies baseline requirements. However, the role is a director-level IC position demanding deep, demonstrated AI expertise, recognized thought leadership, and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI strategy at scale. His AI involvement is limited to very recent work (2025) on MCP tooling at re:cinq — there is no history of building AI-powered products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no cloud platform architecture experience beyond AWS CDK usage, and no evidence of external thought leadership (publications, keynotes, advisory roles) that this role explicitly requires.
strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and end-to-end product ownership, including open-source community engagement
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing early-stage alignment with the AI focus of the position
concerns: AI involvement is shallow and very recent (2025 only); no track record of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, which is a stated preference and expected for a director-level technical strategy role
No evidence of strategic customer advisory experience, executive-level thought leadership, public AI expertise recognition, or cloud platform architecture at the scale this role demands

key_factors.factor: Absence of cloud platform leadership and strategic advisory track record
